name: backend_universidad_peticiones
description: Sistema universitario basico en NestJS con Prisma y TypeScript.

scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); if (fs.existsSync('tsconfig.build.tsbuildinfo')) fs.rmSync('tsconfig.build.tsbuildinfo', { force: true });"
scripts.setup: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:seed
